volatility_targeting.note: 旧版8%目标波动率缩放结果已废弃，仅供历史兼容，不作为股票账户官方仓位建议。

factor_changes: stock account position policy v2 uses recommended_equity_position_range as the official position output
risk_caps are resolved by lowest score_cap with severity as tie-breaker, and records expose applied_cap plus discarded_caps for conflict review
risk_caps can cap final market_position_score for bubble, blowoff volume, sector concentration, high volatility, crowding, missing risk data, and strong-index weak-breadth regimes
8% target-volatility scaling is deprecated and no longer changes the official stock-account position range
position ranges now use stock-account exposure and can reach 90%-100% in low-crowding strong trends
capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
allocation_policy_v2 uses four stock-account sleeves: beta core, alpha active, defensive factor, and liquidity; mainline ETF plus leader stock are merged into alpha active
market_regime_v1 adds a structural layer for accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction classification
market_trend_v1 adds trend_state, trend_strength, and trend_duration from index trend, breadth persistence, and liquidity slope
risk_engine_v1 adds continuous risk_penalty_score and risk_discount before hard risk_cap constraints
position_model_v1 maps base position through trend, regime, and risk multipliers before hard risk_cap constraints
contrarian_beta_overlay_v1 adds a deep-bear value/reversal floor for beta_core only; it does not unlock alpha_active
key_constraints: 上涨家数和行业上涨占比不足时，不把指数强势直接等同于全面加仓。
主力资金持续流出时，进攻仓只做主线，不扩散到弱势行业。
估值分位偏贵时，即使趋势强也要用拥挤惩罚和风险上限约束泡沫风险。
北向与主力资金同时大幅流出时，即使趋势分高也触发资金退潮仓位上限。
成交额或换手极端放量且估值/波动偏高时，按爆量顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
前五行业资金或涨幅高度集中且估值/波动偏高时，按主线拥挤顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
股票账户官方仓位不再按8%目标波动率缩放，波动率仅作为风险扣分、上限和提示。
深熊逆向加仓只抬高 β核心仓宽基 ETF，不开放 α主动仓，不替代标的研究。

observations: 主线得分 80%，宽度得分 100%，差值 -20pct。
成长主线线索：软件开发, 通信服务 位于涨幅或资金流入前列。
传统权重反抽线索：农林牧渔, 证券, 保险 位于涨幅或资金流入前列。
资金分歧：北向 36.45亿元，主力 -463.06亿元。
已触发 2 项风险上限，仓位分优先服从风控。
watch_points: 半导体/芯片等成长主线是继续扩散，还是仅维持资金抱团。
传统权重反抽是否延续，并能否带动指数与个股宽度共振。
主力资金是否收敛流出，风险上限数量是否下降。

signals.name: breadth
signals.note: Width expansion supports expansion; weak breadth supports contraction or distribution.

signals.name: liquidity
signals.note: Moderate volume and active turnover support expansion; shrinkage supports contraction.

signals.name: valuation
signals.note: Cheap valuation supports accumulation; expensive valuation supports distribution risk.

signals.name: capital_flow
signals.note: Persistent inflow supports expansion; main outflow or divergence supports distribution/contraction.

signals.name: index_trend
signals.note: Index trend score and 5/20 day momentum define the trend backbone.

signals.name: breadth_persistence
signals.note: Breadth persistence separates broad trend from narrow index movement.

signals.name: liquidity_slope
signals.note: Liquidity expansion supports early and strong trends; contraction flags weakening.

signals.name: trend_maturity
signals.note: Duration and MA20 deviation distinguish early trend from late trend.

alpha_active_components.industry_theme_etf: α主动仓基础部分，承接主线行业和主题 ETF。
alpha_active_components.leader_stock: α主动仓增强部分，只在主线、成交和宽度确认时开放。
alpha_active_components.leader_stock_internal_cap: 龙头个股合计建议不超过 α主动仓的 30%-40%，退潮时优先收缩。

principles: 风险资产总仓位由最终仓位分决定，β核心仓、α主动仓、防御因子仓共享这部分风险资产。
β核心仓只承接宽基 ETF，不承担主线押注任务。
α主动仓合并主线行业 ETF 和龙头个股，主线退潮或高波动时最先收缩。
防御因子仓仍是权益资产，承担红利、低波、自由现金流和质量因子暴露。
流动性仓承接未配置风险资产，是现金管理和再平衡弹药。

items.label: 北向流入但主力大幅流出

volatility_targeting.note: 旧版8%目标波动率缩放结果已废弃，仅供历史兼容，不作为股票账户官方仓位建议。

factor_changes: stock account position policy v2 uses recommended_equity_position_range as the official position output
risk_caps are resolved by lowest score_cap with severity as tie-breaker, and records expose applied_cap plus discarded_caps for conflict review
risk_caps can cap final market_position_score for bubble, blowoff volume, sector concentration, high volatility, crowding, missing risk data, and strong-index weak-breadth regimes
8% target-volatility scaling is deprecated and no longer changes the official stock-account position range
position ranges now use stock-account exposure and can reach 90%-100% in low-crowding strong trends
capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
allocation_policy_v2 uses four stock-account sleeves: beta core, alpha active, defensive factor, and liquidity; mainline ETF plus leader stock are merged into alpha active
market_regime_v1 adds a structural layer for accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction classification
market_trend_v1 adds trend_state, trend_strength, and trend_duration from index trend, breadth persistence, and liquidity slope
risk_engine_v1 adds continuous risk_penalty_score and risk_discount before hard risk_cap constraints
position_model_v1 maps base position through trend, regime, and risk multipliers before hard risk_cap constraints
contrarian_beta_overlay_v1 adds a deep-bear value/reversal floor for beta_core only; it does not unlock alpha_active
key_constraints: 上涨家数和行业上涨占比不足时，不把指数强势直接等同于全面加仓。
主力资金持续流出时，进攻仓只做主线，不扩散到弱势行业。
估值分位偏贵时，即使趋势强也要用拥挤惩罚和风险上限约束泡沫风险。
北向与主力资金同时大幅流出时，即使趋势分高也触发资金退潮仓位上限。
成交额或换手极端放量且估值/波动偏高时，按爆量顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
前五行业资金或涨幅高度集中且估值/波动偏高时，按主线拥挤顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
股票账户官方仓位不再按8%目标波动率缩放，波动率仅作为风险扣分、上限和提示。
深熊逆向加仓只抬高 β核心仓宽基 ETF，不开放 α主动仓，不替代标的研究。

market_observation.summary: 主线 47.38%，宽度 32.19%；成长线索在 光学光电子；传统权重反抽在 煤炭, 银行；市场中位数 -0.49%、上涨占比 40.22%；仓位分 14.29，推荐 0%-20%，防守观察。

risk_caps.message: 估值模块得分偏低，股票账户仓位分上限限制为55。
估值极贵且波动率偏高，泡沫顶部风险触发强仓位上限。
30日年化波动率偏高，股票账户仓位分上限限制为55。

observations: 成长主线线索：光学光电子 位于涨幅或资金流入前列。
传统权重反抽线索：煤炭, 银行 位于涨幅或资金流入前列。
宽度仍弱：上涨占比 40.22%，个股中位数 -0.49%，强跌占比 20.39%。
资金分歧：北向 42.4亿元，主力 -713.54亿元。
已触发 3 项风险上限，仓位分优先服从风控。
watch_points: 宽度修复是否发生：上涨占比、行业上涨占比和个股中位数需要同步改善。
半导体/芯片等成长主线是继续扩散，还是仅维持资金抱团。
传统权重反抽是否延续，并能否带动指数与个股宽度共振。
主力资金是否收敛流出，风险上限数量是否下降。

signals.name: breadth
signals.note: Width expansion supports expansion; weak breadth supports contraction or distribution.

signals.name: liquidity
signals.note: Moderate volume and active turnover support expansion; shrinkage supports contraction.

signals.name: valuation
signals.note: Cheap valuation supports accumulation; expensive valuation supports distribution risk.

signals.name: capital_flow
signals.note: Persistent inflow supports expansion; main outflow or divergence supports distribution/contraction.

signals.name: index_trend
signals.note: Index trend score and 5/20 day momentum define the trend backbone.

signals.name: breadth_persistence
signals.note: Breadth persistence separates broad trend from narrow index movement.

signals.name: liquidity_slope
signals.note: Liquidity expansion supports early and strong trends; contraction flags weakening.

signals.name: trend_maturity
signals.note: Duration and MA20 deviation distinguish early trend from late trend.

alpha_active_components.industry_theme_etf: α主动仓基础部分，承接主线行业和主题 ETF。
alpha_active_components.leader_stock: α主动仓增强部分，只在主线、成交和宽度确认时开放。
alpha_active_components.leader_stock_internal_cap: 龙头个股合计建议不超过 α主动仓的 30%-40%，退潮时优先收缩。

principles: 风险资产总仓位由最终仓位分决定，β核心仓、α主动仓、防御因子仓共享这部分风险资产。
β核心仓只承接宽基 ETF，不承担主线押注任务。
α主动仓合并主线行业 ETF 和龙头个股，主线退潮或高波动时最先收缩。
防御因子仓仍是权益资产，承担红利、低波、自由现金流和质量因子暴露。
流动性仓承接未配置风险资产，是现金管理和再平衡弹药。

α主动仓未充分打开：需要主线强度、成交持续和宽度同时确认。
notes: 所有比例为股票账户内部配置区间，不代表总资产配置。
单个 ETF、行业、个股仍需由标的研究系统单独确认；本模块只做市场层资金分配。
旧 allocation_policy_v1 的主线 ETF 与龙头仓在展示层会折算为 α主动仓。

alpha_active_components.industry_theme_etf: α主动仓基础部分，承接主线行业和主题 ETF。
alpha_active_components.leader_stock: α主动仓增强部分，只在主线、成交和宽度确认时开放。
alpha_active_components.leader_stock_internal_cap: 龙头个股合计建议不超过 α主动仓的 30%-40%，退潮时优先收缩。

principles: 风险资产总仓位由最终仓位分决定，β核心仓、α主动仓、防御因子仓共享这部分风险资产。
β核心仓只承接宽基 ETF，不承担主线押注任务。
α主动仓合并主线行业 ETF 和龙头个股，主线退潮或高波动时最先收缩。
防御因子仓仍是权益资产，承担红利、低波、自由现金流和质量因子暴露。
流动性仓承接未配置风险资产，是现金管理和再平衡弹药。

volatility_targeting.note: 旧版8%目标波动率缩放结果已废弃，仅供历史兼容，不作为股票账户官方仓位建议。

factor_changes: stock account position policy v2 uses recommended_equity_position_range as the official position output
risk_caps are resolved by lowest score_cap with severity as tie-breaker, and records expose applied_cap plus discarded_caps for conflict review
risk_caps can cap final market_position_score for bubble, blowoff volume, sector concentration, high volatility, crowding, missing risk data, and strong-index weak-breadth regimes
8% target-volatility scaling is deprecated and no longer changes the official stock-account position range
position ranges now use stock-account exposure and can reach 90%-100% in low-crowding strong trends
capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
allocation_policy_v2 uses four stock-account sleeves: beta core, alpha active, defensive factor, and liquidity; mainline ETF plus leader stock are merged into alpha active
market_regime_v1 adds a structural layer for accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction classification
market_trend_v1 adds trend_state, trend_strength, and trend_duration from index trend, breadth persistence, and liquidity slope
risk_engine_v1 adds continuous risk_penalty_score and risk_discount before hard risk_cap constraints
position_model_v1 maps base position through trend, regime, and risk multipliers before hard risk_cap constraints
contrarian_beta_overlay_v1 adds a deep-bear value/reversal floor for beta_core only; it does not unlock alpha_active

深熊逆向加仓只抬高 β核心仓宽基 ETF，不开放 α主动仓，不替代标的研究。

α主动仓合并主线行业 ETF 和龙头个股，主线退潮或高波动时最先收缩。
防御因子仓仍是权益资产，承担红利、低波、自由现金流和质量因子暴露。
流动性仓承接未配置风险资产，是现金管理和再平衡弹药。

index_trend.label: 指数趋势
index_trend.summary: 指数趋势中性，1/4个指数站上MA20，20日平均涨跌+0.56%。

evidence.label: 站上MA20指数数
evidence.note: 越多越说明指数层面修复更广。

evidence.label: 指数平均5日涨跌
evidence.note: 短期动量衡量反弹强度。

evidence.label: 指数平均20日涨跌
evidence.note: 20日趋势决定是否从反弹进入趋势。

evidence.label: 平均MA20偏离
evidence.note: 温和站上均线最好，过热或深跌都降分。

evidence.label: 沪深创趋势一致性
evidence.note: 大盘和成长同时走强时更稳。

breadth.label: 市场宽度
breadth.summary: 市场宽度偏强，上涨家数占比68.96%，个股中位数涨跌+1.22%。

evidence.label: 上涨家数占比
evidence.note: 宽度不足时，指数上涨容易变成少数主线行情。

evidence.label: 行业上涨占比
evidence.note: 行业扩散越充分，行情越健康。

evidence.label: 个股中位数涨跌
evidence.note: 中位数涨跌能直接衡量多数股票的真实赚钱效应。

evidence.label: 强势股-弱势股占比差
evidence.note: 涨幅超3%多于跌幅超3%时，赚钱效应更扎实。

evidence.label: 涨跌停结构
evidence.note: 涨停多且跌停少代表情绪仍可用。

evidence.label: 最高连板
evidence.note: 连板高度衡量短线风险偏好。

evidence.label: 指数与宽度一致性
evidence.note: 指数强但宽度弱时降分。

liquidity.label: 成交与流动性
liquidity.summary: 成交与流动性偏强，指数平均量能比0.96倍，中小盘成交占比79.65%。

evidence.label: 指数平均量能比
evidence.note: 温和放量优于缩量或爆量。

evidence.label: 中小盘成交占比
evidence.note: 中小盘活跃代表风险偏好抬升。

evidence.label: 大盘成交占比
evidence.note: 大盘承接不足会降低趋势稳定性。

capital_flow.label: 资金与风险偏好
capital_flow.summary: 资金面中性，北向流入但主力流出，5日样本北向5日、主力5日。

evidence.label: 北向当日净流入
evidence.note: 外资当日方向对风险偏好有边际影响。

evidence.label: 主力当日净流入
evidence.note: 主力资金代表内资承接和兑现压力。

evidence.label: 内外资一致性
evidence.note: 北向和主力同向时更可靠，背离时降分。

evidence.label: 北向5日持续性
evidence.note: 样本少于4日时最多按中性持续性计分。

evidence.label: 主力5日持续性
evidence.note: 样本少于4日时最多按中性资金确认计分。

mainline.label: 主线强度
mainline.summary: 主线强度偏强，价量重合0组，前五行业净流入269.0亿元。

evidence.label: 涨幅前五行业均值
evidence.note: 领涨行业涨幅越强，主线越清晰。

evidence.label: 前五行业净流入合计
evidence.note: 资金集中流入说明主线有承接。

evidence.label: 价量重合主线数
evidence.note: 涨幅榜和资金榜重合越高越可靠。

evidence.label: 资金主线组数
evidence.note: 主线过窄时降低扩仓质量。

evidence.label: 当前主线5日重复率
evidence.note: 样本少于4日时最多按中性连续性计分。

top5_industry_inflow_5d_sum_100m_cny.label: 前五行业5日净流入合计

valuation.label: 估值与再定价
valuation.summary: 宽基估值相对五年历史偏贵，趋势行情需要更强风控约束。

evidence.label: 综合估值便宜度
evidence.note: 分数越高代表相对五年分位越便宜。

evidence.label: PE便宜度
evidence.note: 盈利口径估值越低越有安全边际。

evidence.label: PB便宜度
evidence.note: 净资产口径用于约束泡沫风险。

evidence.label: 股债性价比
evidence.note: 缺少ERP时先给中性，后续可接入股债利差。

macro.label: 宏观与外部环境
macro.summary: 宏观与外部环境偏强，中国10Y为1.75%，美元指数100.86。

evidence.label: 中国10Y国债
evidence.note: 国内利率低，对权益流动性有支撑。

evidence.label: 美国10Y国债
evidence.note: 海外利率高会压制成长资产估值。

evidence.label: 美元指数
evidence.note: 美元偏强时风险偏好承压。

evidence.label: 美元兑人民币
evidence.note: 人民币稳定有利于外资和风险偏好。

volatility_targeting.note: 旧版8%目标波动率缩放结果已废弃，仅供历史兼容，不作为股票账户官方仓位建议。

factor_changes: stock account position policy v2 uses recommended_equity_position_range as the official position output
risk_caps are resolved by lowest score_cap with severity as tie-breaker, and records expose applied_cap plus discarded_caps for conflict review
risk_caps can cap final market_position_score for bubble, blowoff volume, sector concentration, high volatility, crowding, missing risk data, and strong-index weak-breadth regimes
8% target-volatility scaling is deprecated and no longer changes the official stock-account position range
position ranges now use stock-account exposure and can reach 90%-100% in low-crowding strong trends
capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
allocation_policy_v2 uses four stock-account sleeves: beta core, alpha active, defensive factor, and liquidity; mainline ETF plus leader stock are merged into alpha active
market_regime_v1 adds a structural layer for accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction classification
market_trend_v1 adds trend_state, trend_strength, and trend_duration from index trend, breadth persistence, and liquidity slope
risk_engine_v1 adds continuous risk_penalty_score and risk_discount before hard risk_cap constraints
position_model_v1 maps base position through trend, regime, and risk multipliers before hard risk_cap constraints
contrarian_beta_overlay_v1 adds a deep-bear value/reversal floor for beta_core only; it does not unlock alpha_active
key_constraints: 上涨家数和行业上涨占比不足时，不把指数强势直接等同于全面加仓。
主力资金持续流出时，进攻仓只做主线，不扩散到弱势行业。
估值分位偏贵时，即使趋势强也要用拥挤惩罚和风险上限约束泡沫风险。
北向与主力资金同时大幅流出时，即使趋势分高也触发资金退潮仓位上限。
成交额或换手极端放量且估值/波动偏高时，按爆量顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
前五行业资金或涨幅高度集中且估值/波动偏高时，按主线拥挤顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
股票账户官方仓位不再按8%目标波动率缩放，波动率仅作为风险扣分、上限和提示。
深熊逆向加仓只抬高 β核心仓宽基 ETF，不开放 α主动仓，不替代标的研究。

signals.name: breadth
signals.note: Width expansion supports expansion; weak breadth supports contraction or distribution.

signals.name: liquidity
signals.note: Moderate volume and active turnover support expansion; shrinkage supports contraction.

signals.name: valuation
signals.note: Cheap valuation supports accumulation; expensive valuation supports distribution risk.

signals.name: capital_flow
signals.note: Persistent inflow supports expansion; main outflow or divergence supports distribution/contraction.

signals.name: index_trend
signals.note: Index trend score and 5/20 day momentum define the trend backbone.

signals.name: breadth_persistence
signals.note: Breadth persistence separates broad trend from narrow index movement.

signals.name: liquidity_slope
signals.note: Liquidity expansion supports early and strong trends; contraction flags weakening.

signals.name: trend_maturity
signals.note: Duration and MA20 deviation distinguish early trend from late trend.

index_trend.label: 指数趋势
index_trend.summary: 指数趋势偏弱，0/4个指数站上MA20，20日平均涨跌+0.01%。

evidence.label: 站上MA20指数数
evidence.note: 越多越说明指数层面修复更广。

evidence.label: 指数平均5日涨跌
evidence.note: 短期动量衡量反弹强度。

evidence.label: 指数平均20日涨跌
evidence.note: 20日趋势决定是否从反弹进入趋势。

evidence.label: 平均MA20偏离
evidence.note: 温和站上均线最好，过热或深跌都降分。

evidence.label: 沪深创趋势一致性
evidence.note: 大盘和成长同时走强时更稳。

breadth.label: 市场宽度
breadth.summary: 市场宽度偏弱，上涨家数占比12.56%，赚钱效应扩散不足。

evidence.label: 上涨家数占比
evidence.note: 宽度不足时，指数上涨容易变成少数主线行情。

evidence.label: 行业上涨占比
evidence.note: 行业扩散越充分，行情越健康。

evidence.label: 个股中位数涨跌
evidence.note: 中位数涨跌能直接衡量多数股票的真实赚钱效应。

evidence.label: 强势股-弱势股占比差
evidence.note: 涨幅超3%多于跌幅超3%时，赚钱效应更扎实。

evidence.label: 涨跌停结构
evidence.note: 涨停多且跌停少代表情绪仍可用。

evidence.label: 最高连板
evidence.note: 连板高度衡量短线风险偏好。

evidence.label: 指数与宽度一致性
evidence.note: 指数强但宽度弱时降分。

liquidity.label: 成交与流动性
liquidity.summary: 成交与流动性中性，指数平均量能比0.8倍，中小盘成交占比81.2%。

evidence.label: 指数平均量能比
evidence.note: 温和放量优于缩量或爆量。

evidence.label: 中小盘成交占比
evidence.note: 中小盘活跃代表风险偏好抬升。

evidence.label: 大盘成交占比
evidence.note: 大盘承接不足会降低趋势稳定性。

capital_flow.label: 资金与风险偏好
capital_flow.summary: 资金面偏弱，北向流入但主力流出，5日样本北向5日、主力5日。

evidence.label: 北向当日净流入
evidence.note: 外资当日方向对风险偏好有边际影响。

evidence.label: 主力当日净流入
evidence.note: 主力资金代表内资承接和兑现压力。

evidence.label: 内外资一致性
evidence.note: 北向和主力同向时更可靠，背离时降分。

evidence.label: 北向5日持续性
evidence.note: 样本少于4日时最多按中性持续性计分。

evidence.label: 主力5日持续性
evidence.note: 样本少于4日时最多按中性资金确认计分。

mainline.label: 主线强度
mainline.summary: 主线强度中性，价量重合3组，仍以结构性机会为主。

evidence.label: 涨幅前五行业均值
evidence.note: 领涨行业涨幅越强，主线越清晰。

evidence.label: 前五行业净流入合计
evidence.note: 资金集中流入说明主线有承接。

evidence.label: 价量重合主线数
evidence.note: 涨幅榜和资金榜重合越高越可靠。

evidence.label: 资金主线组数
evidence.note: 主线过窄时降低扩仓质量。

evidence.label: 当前主线5日重复率
evidence.note: 样本少于4日时最多按中性连续性计分。

top5_industry_inflow_5d_sum_100m_cny.label: 前五行业5日净流入合计

valuation.label: 估值与再定价
valuation.summary: 宽基估值相对五年历史偏贵，趋势行情需要更强风控约束。

evidence.label: 综合估值便宜度
evidence.note: 分数越高代表相对五年分位越便宜。

evidence.label: PE便宜度
evidence.note: 盈利口径估值越低越有安全边际。

evidence.label: PB便宜度
evidence.note: 净资产口径用于约束泡沫风险。

evidence.label: 股债性价比
evidence.note: 缺少ERP时先给中性，后续可接入股债利差。

macro.label: 宏观与外部环境
macro.summary: 宏观与外部环境偏强，中国10Y为1.74%，美元指数100.92。

evidence.label: 中国10Y国债
evidence.note: 国内利率低，对权益流动性有支撑。

evidence.label: 美国10Y国债
evidence.note: 海外利率高会压制成长资产估值。

evidence.label: 美元指数
evidence.note: 美元偏强时风险偏好承压。

evidence.label: 美元兑人民币
evidence.note: 人民币稳定有利于外资和风险偏好。

items.label: 北向流入但主力大幅流出
资金过度集中在单一主线

volatility_targeting.note: 旧版8%目标波动率缩放结果已废弃，仅供历史兼容，不作为股票账户官方仓位建议。

factor_changes: stock account position policy v2 uses recommended_equity_position_range as the official position output
risk_caps are resolved by lowest score_cap with severity as tie-breaker, and records expose applied_cap plus discarded_caps for conflict review
risk_caps can cap final market_position_score for bubble, blowoff volume, sector concentration, high volatility, crowding, missing risk data, and strong-index weak-breadth regimes
8% target-volatility scaling is deprecated and no longer changes the official stock-account position range
position ranges now use stock-account exposure and can reach 90%-100% in low-crowding strong trends
capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
allocation_policy_v2 uses four stock-account sleeves: beta core, alpha active, defensive factor, and liquidity; mainline ETF plus leader stock are merged into alpha active
market_regime_v1 adds a structural layer for accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction classification
market_trend_v1 adds trend_state, trend_strength, and trend_duration from index trend, breadth persistence, and liquidity slope
risk_engine_v1 adds continuous risk_penalty_score and risk_discount before hard risk_cap constraints
position_model_v1 maps base position through trend, regime, and risk multipliers before hard risk_cap constraints
contrarian_beta_overlay_v1 adds a deep-bear value/reversal floor for beta_core only; it does not unlock alpha_active
key_constraints: 上涨家数和行业上涨占比不足时，不把指数强势直接等同于全面加仓。
主力资金持续流出时，进攻仓只做主线，不扩散到弱势行业。
估值分位偏贵时，即使趋势强也要用拥挤惩罚和风险上限约束泡沫风险。
北向与主力资金同时大幅流出时，即使趋势分高也触发资金退潮仓位上限。
成交额或换手极端放量且估值/波动偏高时，按爆量顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
前五行业资金或涨幅高度集中且估值/波动偏高时，按主线拥挤顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
股票账户官方仓位不再按8%目标波动率缩放，波动率仅作为风险扣分、上限和提示。
深熊逆向加仓只抬高 β核心仓宽基 ETF，不开放 α主动仓，不替代标的研究。

observations: 主线得分 67.71%，宽度得分 6.56%，差值 61.15pct。
成长主线线索：半导体, 通信设备, 通信, 电子 位于涨幅或资金流入前列。
传统权重反抽线索：银行 位于涨幅或资金流入前列。
宽度仍弱：上涨占比 12.56%，个股中位数 -2.91%，强跌占比 47.65%。
资金分歧：北向 33.7亿元，主力 -738.68亿元。
已触发 3 项风险上限，仓位分优先服从风控。
watch_points: 宽度修复是否发生：上涨占比、行业上涨占比和个股中位数需要同步改善。
半导体/芯片等成长主线是继续扩散，还是仅维持资金抱团。
传统权重反抽是否延续，并能否带动指数与个股宽度共振。
主力资金是否收敛流出，风险上限数量是否下降。

signals.name: breadth
signals.note: Width expansion supports expansion; weak breadth supports contraction or distribution.

signals.name: liquidity
signals.note: Moderate volume and active turnover support expansion; shrinkage supports contraction.

signals.name: valuation
signals.note: Cheap valuation supports accumulation; expensive valuation supports distribution risk.

signals.name: capital_flow
signals.note: Persistent inflow supports expansion; main outflow or divergence supports distribution/contraction.

signals.name: index_trend
signals.note: Index trend score and 5/20 day momentum define the trend backbone.

signals.name: breadth_persistence
signals.note: Breadth persistence separates broad trend from narrow index movement.

signals.name: liquidity_slope
signals.note: Liquidity expansion supports early and strong trends; contraction flags weakening.

signals.name: trend_maturity
signals.note: Duration and MA20 deviation distinguish early trend from late trend.

alpha_active_components.industry_theme_etf: α主动仓基础部分，承接主线行业和主题 ETF。
alpha_active_components.leader_stock: α主动仓增强部分，只在主线、成交和宽度确认时开放。
alpha_active_components.leader_stock_internal_cap: 龙头个股合计建议不超过 α主动仓的 30%-40%，退潮时优先收缩。

principles: 风险资产总仓位由最终仓位分决定，β核心仓、α主动仓、防御因子仓共享这部分风险资产。
β核心仓只承接宽基 ETF，不承担主线押注任务。
α主动仓合并主线行业 ETF 和龙头个股，主线退潮或高波动时最先收缩。
防御因子仓仍是权益资产，承担红利、低波、自由现金流和质量因子暴露。
流动性仓承接未配置风险资产，是现金管理和再平衡弹药。

volatility_targeting.note: 旧版8%目标波动率缩放结果已废弃，仅供历史兼容，不作为股票账户官方仓位建议。

factor_changes: stock account position policy v2 uses recommended_equity_position_range as the official position output
risk_caps are resolved by lowest score_cap with severity as tie-breaker, and records expose applied_cap plus discarded_caps for conflict review
risk_caps can cap final market_position_score for bubble, blowoff volume, sector concentration, high volatility, crowding, missing risk data, and strong-index weak-breadth regimes
8% target-volatility scaling is deprecated and no longer changes the official stock-account position range
position ranges now use stock-account exposure and can reach 90%-100% in low-crowding strong trends
capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
allocation_policy_v2 uses four stock-account sleeves: beta core, alpha active, defensive factor, and liquidity; mainline ETF plus leader stock are merged into alpha active
market_regime_v1 adds a structural layer for accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction classification
market_trend_v1 adds trend_state, trend_strength, and trend_duration from index trend, breadth persistence, and liquidity slope
risk_engine_v1 adds continuous risk_penalty_score and risk_discount before hard risk_cap constraints
position_model_v1 maps base position through trend, regime, and risk multipliers before hard risk_cap constraints
contrarian_beta_overlay_v1 adds a deep-bear value/reversal floor for beta_core only; it does not unlock alpha_active
key_constraints: 上涨家数和行业上涨占比不足时，不把指数强势直接等同于全面加仓。
主力资金持续流出时，进攻仓只做主线，不扩散到弱势行业。
估值分位偏贵时，即使趋势强也要用拥挤惩罚和风险上限约束泡沫风险。
北向与主力资金同时大幅流出时，即使趋势分高也触发资金退潮仓位上限。
成交额或换手极端放量且估值/波动偏高时，按爆量顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
前五行业资金或涨幅高度集中且估值/波动偏高时，按主线拥挤顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
股票账户官方仓位不再按8%目标波动率缩放，波动率仅作为风险扣分、上限和提示。
深熊逆向加仓只抬高 β核心仓宽基 ETF，不开放 α主动仓，不替代标的研究。

market_observation.summary: 主线强但宽度弱：主线 74.47%，宽度 13.5%；成长线索在 半导体, 通信设备；传统权重反抽在 煤炭, 银行, 石油石化；市场中位数 -1.4%、上涨占比 28.87%；仓位分 14.06，推荐 0%-20%，防守观察，不确认全面反转。

risk_caps.message: 估值模块得分偏低，股票账户仓位分上限限制为55。
估值极贵且波动率偏高，泡沫顶部风险触发强仓位上限。
30日年化波动率偏高，股票账户仓位分上限限制为55。

observations: 主线得分 74.47%，宽度得分 13.5%，差值 60.97pct。
成长主线线索：半导体, 通信设备, 软件开发, 计算机 位于涨幅或资金流入前列。
传统权重反抽线索：煤炭, 银行, 石油石化 位于涨幅或资金流入前列。
宽度仍弱：上涨占比 28.87%，个股中位数 -1.4%，强跌占比 29.14%。
资金分歧：北向 33.84亿元，主力 -232.38亿元。
已触发 3 项风险上限，仓位分优先服从风控。
watch_points: 宽度修复是否发生：上涨占比、行业上涨占比和个股中位数需要同步改善。
半导体/芯片等成长主线是继续扩散，还是仅维持资金抱团。
传统权重反抽是否延续，并能否带动指数与个股宽度共振。
主力资金是否收敛流出，风险上限数量是否下降。
